title: AppOpacity enum has zero test coverage
description: AppOpacity (6 tokens: iconAura, warningBackground, warningSeparator, pressedButton, mutedTimestamp, subtleBorder) was added in Round 1 but has no unit tests. All 6 values should have spec assertions in DesignSystemTests.
action: Add 6 spec tests + 1 allOpacitiesInRange guard to DesignSystemTests.swift

title: withMotionSafe() View extension has zero test coverage
description: The withMotionSafe(_:animation:action:) helper in Components.swift (line 135) is untested. Should verify: (1) action runs immediately when reduceMotion=true, (2) action runs inside animation when reduceMotion=false.
action: Add 2 tests to ComponentsTests.swift covering both branches

title: UI tests not runnable via SPM scheme
description: EyePostureReminderUITests target is not in the SPM test plan. UI tests (OverlayTests, DarkModeUITests) can only run from Xcode IDE, not from CLI xcodebuild with the current scheme.
action: No immediate action needed — Xcode project scheme covers these. Document for CI setup.
